root.sql: select sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , current_date from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type in ('21','25') and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' /*WHERE*/
